research_question: In patients with long-term bone marrow failure disorders requiring platelet transfusions (excluding those receiving hematopoietic stem cell transplantation or intensive chemotherapy), what is the comparative effectiveness and safety of therapeutic (on-demand) platelet transfusions versus prophylactic platelet transfusions?
